applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: Test asserts ttnn.tosa_gather(input, index) matches a precomputed torch_gather reference (TOSA gather semantics: out[n, w, c] = input[n, index[n, w], c], realized via torch.gather along the W dim with index expanded over channels). No registered golden function; pattern recovered from the unit test's torch_gather reference comparison.

placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(input, ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.Layout.TILE, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory_config
unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(index, ttnn.uint32, layout=ttnn.Layout.TILE, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory_config
